summary: Comprehensive testing of Alfa Global Group blog article pages for Insights & Research section. All 6 articles have dedicated pages with full long-form content, proper navigation, and content rendering. All features working correctly except one known image issue.

issues: Featured image not loading - Unsplash URL returns 404 (https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559136560-16e285589b58?w=800)

action_items: Replace Maritime Industry Report image URL with a working shipping/maritime image from Unsplash
critical_code_review_comments: insightsData.js properly structures all 6 articles with slug, title, category, date, read time, image, summary, author, and sections array
InsightArticlePage.jsx correctly handles bold text (**text**) parsing and bullet point rendering
Invalid slug redirect to /insights working via Navigate component
Related articles section properly excludes current article and shows 3 others
Homepage research cards correctly link to individual article pages (/insights/{slug}) not listing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog article pages fully implemented and tested. All 6 articles have proper content with 6 sections each. Only issue is Maritime Industry Report image URL returning 404 from Unsplash.
